commands.repair_reason: - [P1] Contributor real behavior proof and maintainer product/security acceptance are required before this can become merge-ready.; Needs attention: The scoped follow-up avoids global hook disable, but guarded denial still changes a security-sensitive native hook relay admission path. commands.review_summary:
Adds an opt-in Codex app-server native hook relay memory guard that suppresses OpenClaw relay hook state under memory, RSS, or active-relay pressure for main and side-question turns.

PR surface: Source +410, Tests +235, Docs +38. Total +683 across 10 files.

Reproducibility: Source-level yes, real-pressure no: current main hard-enables Codex native relay hooks and #91009 has field reports, but this PR has no live Linux pressure run showing the guard in action.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Contributor real behavior proof and maintainer product/security acceptance are required before this can become merge-ready.
